title: Vue 3 New Features Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of Proxy-based reactivity, Teleport, and Fragments (multiple root elements).

questions.question: Which and/or what is the major reactivity improvement in Vue 3?
options: A new Proxy-based reactivity system for better performance and memory usage.
A system only for class components.

questions.question: Which component allows you to render part of a component's template at a completely different location in the DOM?
Can Vue 3 components now have multiple root elements in their template (Fragments)?
options: Yes, this is now fully supported in Vue 3.
No, they still require exactly one root element.

questions.question: Which experimental component was introduced in Vue 3 to handle nested async dependencies in your component tree?
Vue 3 is a built-in library in the Vue core and doesn't require an external package installation.
options: False (it must be installed via 'vue' package)
